generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that underfunded civil defense programs are making us vulnerable to foreign threats? While other nations invest heavily in protecting their citizens, our leaders are cutting corners. It's time to demand better preparedness—our safety shouldn't be a political bargaining chip. #NationalSecurity #CivilDefense
